title: callista acerosa
intro:
Callista acerosa, also known as the Acuminate Callista or Callista acerosa, is a species of sea snail, not a plant. However, I can provide information on a different plant with a similar name. 

Callista is not a plant name I could find, but  Aceroa is a genus of flowering plants in the family Urticaceae, commonly known as the nettle family.
